task_scope.question: 扫描开发库中的超期报销，返回全部异常记录，并对年末补充提交记录进行核对
task_scope.deliverable: All overdue reimbursement anomaly records + verification of year-end supplementary submissions

policy_questions.description: 员工应在费用发生后60天内提交报销申请;超过期限的,原则上不得报销
会计年度末发生的费用,最迟可在财政年度结束后15天内补充提交,逾期按超期报销处理
policy_questions.boundary: December expenses with reimburse_date > Jan 15 of next year are overdue

data_questions.description: Calculate days between expense_date and reimburse_date for all records
Identify records where gap > 60 days per Article 7, excluding year-end exceptions
data_questions.condition: reimburse_date - expense_date > 60 AND NOT (month(expense_date)=12 AND reimburse_date <= fiscal_year_end+15)

data_questions.description: Verify year-end supplementary records per Article 9
data_questions.condition: month(expense_date)=12 AND reimburse_date year differs from expense_date year

evidence_requirements: Data: All 21 records from development database
Year-end analysis: Separate handling for December expenses

reasons: aggregation/grouping/batch filtering: need to scan all 21 records and compute date differences
thresholds/dates/exemptions: 60-day threshold + year-end 15-day rule + special approval exemption
year-end exclusion boundary: separate handling for December expenses

subagent_plan.task: Compute days between expense_date and reimburse_date for all 21 records. Identify records where gap > 60 days per Article 7 (excluding year-end records handled separately). Verify year-end December records per Article 9: reimburse_date must be within 15 days after fiscal year-end (i.e., by Jan 15). Check special_approval flag for any overdue records.
subagent_plan.output: work/analysis/data_findings.json with matched record IDs, SQL, and reconciliation

stopping_conditions: All 21 records evaluated for overdue status
Year-end records separately verified per Article 9
